name: admin-handoff-elevated-78ltv
anchor: F3.AH admin-handoff × F4.EL elevated-band callout interaction
rationale: Admin-direction message on a deal that would trigger F4.EL elevated-band callout (78% LTV). Interaction question: when admin handoff intake classification activates, does F4.EL callout still fire in the admin-handler output, or is the standard prelim path (which generates F4.EL) bypassed entirely?
notes: Single-event sequence. Cross-family interaction between intake classification and gate-derived generator.
